bullets.body: **Lumabas ang MITRE ATT&CK v19 noong Apr 28 — hinati ang Defense Evasion (TA0005) sa Stealth + Impair Defenses; idinagdag ng v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning / tool invocation abuse / MCP server compromise / malicious agent deployment bilang named techniques** — Structural validation ng agentic-AI threat-class. Hindi pa nag-ship ang v19 ng dedicated skill-marketplace-poisoning sub-matrix; iyon ang inferred next step. Apache 2.0 spec available; agentskills.io ang open-standard endpoint.

Direct inference-target para sa Future-1 prediction.

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — hindi pa rin patched sa Apr 30 (higit 11 araw mula disclosure); nag-ship ang v0.5.10 nang exploitable; cross-server class sa vLLM CVE-2025-61620 + LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 + Apr 28 CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter (parehong model-tooling-layer injection shape)** — Walang upstream fix mula maintainer-coordination; patuloy na umiikot ang PoC `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE`; aktibo ang CERT/CC VU#915947.

bullets.body: **CISA KEV Apr 28 — idinagdag ang CVE-2024-1708 ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal + CVE-2026-32202 Windows Shell Protection-Mechanism-Failure spoofing; May-12 federal deadline** — Naka-chain ang ConnectWise CVE-2024-1708 sa CVE-2024-1709 (auth bypass, CVSS 10.0) sa loob ng higit 14 buwan; Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202 ay nanggaling sa incomplete patch para sa CVE-2026-21510, exploited bilang zero-day ng APT28 mula Dec-2025.

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter Injection (CVSS 8.6, Apr 28) — unang 2026 CVE na direktang nasa LLM-tooling supply chain sa RAG query plane** — Tumatanggap ang iba't ibang FilterExpressionConverter implementations ng filter-expression object at isinasalin sa vector-store query languages; hindi tama ang pag-escape ng keys at values, na nagbibigay-daan sa query alteration. Structurally pareho sa SGLang Jinja2/SSTI primitive.
